message:
fix(ft-nn,ft-api): bounds-check EmbeddingBag and scatter_reduce negative indices (frankentorch-gls, frankentorch-8u0)

ft-nn (frankentorch-gls): EmbeddingBag::forward_with_offsets now validates
offset values are non-negative integers, clamps end offsets to n_indices,
checks each embedding index against num_embeddings in both sum/mean and max
modes, and validates that per_sample_weights length matches the indices
length. Returns descriptive errors instead of indexing out of bounds. Added
four regression tests (out-of-range index sum, out-of-range index max,
mismatched per_sample_weights, negative offset).

ft-api (frankentorch-8u0): tensor_scatter_reduce now calls
validate_index_tensor_values before entering the scatter loop and handles
negative indices by wrapping (raw_idx + dim_size) instead of silently
skipping them. Added two regression tests (negative wrap and out-of-range
rejection). Minor rustfmt cleanup in cross_entropy_loss tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
